title: 9 Signs You're Chasing God More Than You're Chasing a Wife
caption:
There's a difference between being single and actually chasing God instead of a wife. Here are 9 signs it's the real thing:

1. You pray about your future without asking Him to hurry it up.
2. Your prayer life isn't just a bargaining table for her name.
3. You'd rather be formed than found right now.
4. You've stopped auditioning women in your head during worship.
5. You can go a season without a date and still feel steady.
6. You ask God to change you before you ask Him for her.
7. You're building a life you'd be proud to hand someone, not a résumé to impress her.
8. You take the delay as formation, not rejection.
9. You know the difference between wanting a wife and needing one to feel whole.

Seek first His kingdom and His righteousness, and all these things will be given to you as well. (Matthew 6:33)

Save this and check where your prayers actually go this week.

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #scripture #relationships #singleness
theme: He chases God, not a wife.
